description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and deploy. The build job runs on a matrix of Python versions and operating systems, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs tox, and runs tests with tox. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the build job, and deploys the package to PyPI and GitHub Releases if the event is a push to a tag.
